title: [ARC] arcilator fails to legalize 'llhd.process' during class instantiation lowering

features.name: class instantiation in procedural block
features.description: Code should include a class instantiation using new() inside an initial procedural block
features.snippet:
class parent; endclass

initial begin
  parent p = new();
end

features.name: empty class declaration
features.description: Code should include a class declaration with no members or methods
